items.ja: 鮑ステーキ ブールノワゼットソース
items.note: Abalone + beurre noisette (browned butter) are naturally gluten-free, but confirm no flour is added to the sauce. One of the best celiac bets here.

items.ja: 鮑ステーキ 七草ソース
items.note: Alternate abalone preparation. Confirm the herb sauce is not flour-thickened.

items.ja: 伊勢海老クリームスープ
items.note: Signature dish, but cream/bisque soups are normally thickened with wheat flour (roux). Treat as contains-wheat unless the kitchen confirms a flour-free version.
Gelee/aspic is usually gelatin-set (GF), but confirm no soy-sauce or wheat-based garnish.

items.ja: 伊勢海老アメリカンソース
items.note: Americaine sauce can contain flour and brandy/cognac; ask whether flour is used.

items.ja: 松阪牛フィレ肉ステーキ ペリグーソース
items.en: Matsusaka beef filet with Perigueux (truffle) sauce
items.note: Perigueux is a demi-glace-based sauce = wheat. The beef itself is GF; request it plain with salt or a confirmed flour-free jus instead of the sauce.

items.en: "Beautiful country" seasonal kaiseki (choice of lobster/abalone/wagyu main)
items.note: Monthly kaiseki with a pick-your-main (伊勢海老 / 鮑 / 黒毛和牛). Sashimi & rice can be safe with own tamari; soy-based sauces, tempura, miso and some pickles are not. Discuss course-wide with the kitchen.

items.ja: 先付「鮑と季節の野菜 柑橘酢味噌添え」
items.romaji: Sakizuke: awabi to kisetsu no yasai, kankitsu su-miso zoe
items.en: Abalone & seasonal vegetables with citrus vinegar-miso
items.note: Abalone/veg are GF, but su-miso (vinegar-miso) may use barley/wheat miso. Ask which miso; request plain citrus/salt if unsure.

items.ja: 造り「低温調理の蒸し鮑 肝醤油 岩戸塩」
items.romaji: Tsukuri: teion-chori no mushi-awabi, kimo-joyu, Iwato-shio
items.en: Low-temp steamed abalone sashimi, liver-soy dip & Iwato salt
items.note: Served with a CHOICE of 肝醤油 (liver soy sauce = wheat) or 岩戸塩 (salt = GF). Eat with the 岩戸塩 salt and skip the soy, or use your own tamari.

items.ja: 焼物「鮑三味焼き（味噌漬け・山椒・バター醤油）」
items.en: Grilled abalone three ways: miso-marinated, sansho, butter-soy
items.note: As served this contains wheat: miso-zuke (barley/wheat miso) and バター醤油 (butter-soy). Request the abalone grilled with SALT (塩焼き) only to make it safe.

items.ja: 料理一題（伊勢海老 お造り／焼物）
items.en: Choose-your-main spiny lobster: sashimi or grilled
items.note: Lobster is GF; sashimi needs your own tamari (soy = wheat) or salt; grilled must be 塩焼き (salt) not tare/butter-soy.

items.ja: ビーガングルテンフリーベーグル
items.note: Signature vegan GF bagel — but baked in a kitchen that also handles wheat; confirm handling.
Raw-food vegan plate; likely GF — confirm no wheat components/cross-contact.
Raw vegan tart, nut/date base — GF; confirm crust.
Vegan; parfait may include granola/cake elements — confirm GF before ordering. · Vegan; confirm the chestnut parfait has no wheat granola/sponge layer.

items.ja: カレーランチ（ビーガンバターチキン）
items.en: Vegan 'butter chicken' curry lunch with raw sides
items.note: Vegan; roux/thickener may contain wheat — ask if GF. · Vegan spice-based 'butter chicken' curry with raw sides; ask that it use no wheat roux/flour.

items.ja: お野菜たっぷりプレート
items.note: Veg plate; may include bread — ask for GF version. · Vegan veg-rich plate; ask to omit any wheat bread/component.
WHEAT sourdough baked on premises — the source of cross-contact risk. Not GF.
Wheat castella — not GF.

items.ja: ハンドドリップ炭焼きコーヒー
items.note: Black coffee — GF/vegan.

items.ja: グルテンフリーの軽食
items.note: Curated GF light meal; ask staff exactly what it is and how prepared. Can be modified vegan/vegetarian on request.

items.ja: グルテンフリーのおやつ
items.note: GF snacks; confirm ingredients.

items.en: Shaved ice with Futami Iwato salt
items.note: Shaved ice — naturally GF; confirm syrup/topping.
Drink — GF/vegan.
Drink — GF/vegan.
Rice-flour batter; anko naturally wheat-free. Confirm bean paste has no dairy.
Custard is rice-flour-thickened (GF) but contains dairy/egg.

items.ja: チョコクリーム三方焼
items.note: Chocolate cream is rice-flour-thickened (GF); contains dairy.
Shaved ice with syrup — naturally GF; confirm syrup only.
GF rice-flour cake; ice cream contains dairy.
Boiled with salt.
Tofu is GF; the soy sauce topping is wheat — ask for salt or your own tamari.

items.ja: 刺身（まぐろ・かつお・かんぱち等）
items.note: Ask for tamari instead of soy sauce.
Ask for tamari.
Usually sake + salt; confirm no soy added.
Ask for salt/wasabi seasoning, no soy-based sauce.
Salt-boiled shirasu over rice; ask for no soy drizzle / bring tamari.
Rice + sashimi are GF; ask for tamari and confirm no soy-marinated toppings (e.g. ikura).
Simmered in soy sauce/mirin — wheat.
Flour-coated and fried — wheat.
Rice cooked with soy sauce/dashi — wheat.
With lemon — GF; skip ponzu (soy).
Salt-grilled — GF. Sashimi option: ask for tamari. Market price.
Ask for tamari instead of soy sauce.
Raw squid; served with soy — ask for tamari.
Ask for salt/tamari, no soy sauce.
Traditionally finished with a little soy sauce in the shell — ask for salt-only.
Ask for salt only, no soy brushed on.
Ask for salt/tamari — usually served with soy.
Wheat noodles with a dark tamari-style sauce.
Wheat noodles; curry roux also contains wheat.
Miso may contain barley and the dashi may have additives — confirm.

items.ja: 浦村かきのがんがん焼
items.note: Steamed oysters in the shell — GF if plain/with lemon; confirm no soy dip.
Steamed — GF; confirm no soy, serve with lemon/salt.
Ask for tamari instead of soy sauce.
Sake + salt usually; confirm no soy.
Ask for salt only, no soy brushed on.
Ask for salt/oil only, no soy sauce.

items.ja: Ａ４ランク　松阪牛カルビ
items.note: Ask for a salt (shio) cut, not the soy-based tare marinade.
Ask for salt (tanshio), no tare.
Ask for shio (salt), not tare.

items.ja: 大っきなえびフライ（1匹）
items.note: Breaded and fried — wheat.
Gochujang/sauce typically contain wheat.

items.ja: 天びん屋の極旨ラーメン
items.note: Wheat noodles.
Wheat noodles + dark tamari-style sauce.
Rice cooked with soy sauce — wheat.

toba_misaki_sazae_ten.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Per-shop prices were not reliably found; item names confirmed across multiple sources but prices omitted.

items.note: This shop's identity is 秘伝のタレ (secret soy-based tare) = wheat. Tsuboyaki is traditionally cooked with soy sauce + sake in the shell. Insist: grill with salt only (塩), no tare/soy.
Ask for plain / salt only, no tare or ponzu. Oyster itself is GF.
Ask for salt only (塩), no secret tare/soy.
Ask for salt only, no tare/soy.
Usually finished with soy or butter-soy. Ask for salt only, no soy.
Request salt-grilled (塩焼き), no tare. If served as sashimi, bring your own tamari.
Usually brushed with soy tare. Request salt only, no soy.
Barley beer = not GF.
Cup is the GF-safe vessel (no wheat cone). Verify the individual flavor has no wheat add-ins.
Cup = no wheat cone. Confirm each flavor.

items.ja: ワッフルコーン シングル
items.note: Waffle cone is wheat — not GF. Choose a cup instead.

items.ja: ジェラートコーン シングル
items.note: Wheat cone — not GF. Choose a cup.
Soy sauce = wheat. Not GF. Avoid.
Sorbet is dairy-free (likely vegan) and likely GF; confirm no wheat. Serve in a cup.
Dairy gelato. Ask whether it contains wheat; serve in a cup.
Dairy gelato; confirm no wheat add-ins; cup only.
Dairy gelato; confirm no wheat; cup only.
Check for cookie/brownie/wheat bits. Cup only.
Black coffee is GF and vegan; milk added makes it non-vegan.

toba_the_kaiya.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Prices are seasonal (marked ~ / 程 = about).

items.note: This shop offers salt or olive-oil dressing as well as soy tare. Request salt or olive oil, no soy tare.
Request salt or olive-oil dressing, no soy tare.
Request salt or olive-oil, no soy tare.
Request salt or olive-oil, no soy.
Tsuboyaki usually has a soy splash. Ask for salt only, no soy.
Request 塩スタイル (salt style); the shop confirms a salt option = GF.
Request salt style, no tare.
Fish is GF; the dipping soy is not. Bring your own tamari; say no soy sauce.
Wheat noodles + dark soy tare. Not GF. Avoid.
Barley beer = not GF.

Tsuboyaki usually has soy + sake. Request salt only, no soy.

toba_kaiten_tenbo_restaurant_.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Reservation-only kaiseki cooked tableside; menus change monthly.

items.ja: 東風と海 極み会席
items.note: Multi-course; components include sashimi (bring tamari), miso, tempura/fried, breadcrumb items = wheat/soy. Kitchen cooks to order — arrange GF at booking: no soy/miso/wheat/tempura/breadcrumbs, salt only.

items.ja: 東風と海 夕凪会席
items.note: As above — request GF prep in advance at booking; several components contain wheat/soy by default.
Abalone is GF; bring your own tamari (soy dip is wheat).
Confirm cooked with salt, no soy sauce / tare.
Fish is GF; bring your own tamari.

toba_kiyoishi.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Tax-included course prices valid Apr 1 - Sep 30 2026.

items.ja: 鮑・美熊野牛付 鉄板焼きコース
items.en: Teppanyaki course with abalone & Mikumano beef
items.note: Teppan beef and vegetables can be cooked with salt not soy (request it). Course bundles sashimi (bring tamari) and miso soup (skip — not GF). Choose plain rice over garlic rice.

items.ja: 伊勢海老・鮑・和牛付 鉄板焼きコース
items.romaji: ise-ebi / awabi / wagyu tsuki teppanyaki course
items.en: Teppanyaki course with Ise lobster, abalone & wagyu
items.note: Request salt/no soy on the teppan meat and veg; skip miso soup and garlic rice (plain rice instead); bring tamari for the sashimi.

items.ja: 料理長おまかせ鉄板焼きコース
items.en: Chef's omakase teppanyaki (Ise lobster, abalone, Matsusaka beef)
items.note: Reserve 7 days ahead — give GF notice then. Request salt only on teppan items, skip miso soup, plain rice not garlic rice, bring tamari for sashimi.
Ask them to grill with salt only, no soy sauce — then GF and vegan.
Plain rice — GF and vegan. Choose over garlic rice (may contain soy).
Coffee/tea is GF; black is vegan, milk added is not.

Japanese set; contents vary and may include plain rice, grilled fish and sashimi. Ask which items are wheat-free; request grilled fish with salt (塩) not tare/sauce, and use your own tamari — not the table soy sauce, which contains wheat.
Wheat pasta.

items.ja: シーズンケーキセット
items.note: Cake — wheat flour.
Cheesecake base is typically wheat.
Sashimi is just the lobster — GF as served. Use your own tamari, not the table soy sauce (contains wheat).
Raw fish over vinegared rice — GF as served if no imitation crab/tamago; ask to skip those and bring your own tamari (table soy sauce = wheat).
Raw fish over rice; ask for no soy/tare drizzle and dress it yourself with your own tamari.
Dashi custard usually contains soy sauce (wheat); confirm ingredients — often not GF.
Breaded and fried — wheat.
Tempura batter is wheat.
Sashimi is fish only — GF as served. Use your own tamari, not the table soy sauce (wheat). If offered as tataki, it may come with ponzu (soy); ask for it plain.
The sashimi itself is GF (use your own tamari). Set sides such as miso soup and pickles may contain wheat/soy — confirm each.
Raw fish over rice; ask for no soy/tare drizzle and dress it yourself with your own tamari.
Simple pickle, but some are cured with soy sauce; confirm no soy sauce.
Thickened ankake sauce is normally soy sauce–based (wheat).
Breaded and fried — wheat.
Chikuwa fish cake contains wheat starch and the tempura batter is wheat.

items.ja: ヴォヤージュ ～Voyage～ 伊勢海老付
items.note: Lobster (伊勢海老) itself is GF. Ask for it grilled/steamed with butter or salt rather than a flour-based americaine/bisque sauce; ask for no bread.

items.ja: シグネチャー ～Signature～ 伊勢海老・鮑付
items.en: Signature course with lobster and abalone
items.note: Lobster + abalone are naturally GF; the risk is the sauces. Ask for grilled/butter preparations, no flour, no soy sauce.

items.ja: テロワール ～Terroir～ 伊勢海老・鮑・和牛付
items.en: Terroir course with lobster, abalone, wagyu beef
items.note: Ask that the beef be served without a demi-glace/flour sauce — grilled with salt, or a butter/wine reduction confirmed flour-free.

items.ja: ガストロノミー ～GASTRONOMIQUE～ 伊勢海老・鮑・松阪牛付
items.en: Gastronomique course with lobster, abalone, Matsusaka beef
items.note: Highest tier; kitchen most able to customize. Confirm every sauce is flour- and soy-free.
Broth is often GF, but it is traditionally served with croutons/rouille on baguette — ask to omit bread and confirm no flour in the base.
Vegan is confirmed, but NOT automatically GF — French vegan courses can include bread, seitan, wheat pasta, or soy sauce. Ask specifically for gluten-free.

items.ja: サスティナブル ランチコース
items.note: Multi-course French. Tell the kitchen you are celiac in advance; ask them to omit bread and avoid flour-thickened sauces, roux, and any soy-based seasonings.
Contents change monthly; confirm the current month's dishes are flour/soy-free.

items.ja: カレー・ピラフ・パスタ
items.note: AVOID curry (Japanese curry roux = wheat) and pasta (wheat). Pilaf (rice) may be workable = ask if you order pilaf specifically and confirm no flour.
Raw shellfish is naturally gluten-free. Comes with dipping soy sauce (contains wheat) — ask for tamari or skip it.
GF by ingredient. Avoid wheat soy sauce / sweet tare; request plain.

items.en: Turban shell grilled in its shell
items.note: Tsuboyaki is typically finished with wheat-containing soy sauce / mirin poured into the shell — treat as NOT gluten-free unless confirmed.
Plainly charcoal-grilled oyster is gluten-free. Not a wheat-free premises; confirm no soy-sauce tare is brushed on.
Local Toba oyster, plainly grilled — GF; request no soy-sauce tare.
Grilled clams are GF; the clam's own juices are the seasoning. Ask them not to add soy sauce.
GF by ingredient; request plain (no tare).
Plainly grilled shellfish — GF; confirm no soy-sauce tare.
Often brushed with soy-sauce tare while grilling — GF only if requested plain.
Grilled clam is GF; ask for no soy-sauce tare.
Plain steamed rice — gluten-free.
Boiled whitebait on rice is GF; confirm no soy sauce is drizzled.

items.en: Ise udon (thick wheat noodles in dark tare)
items.note: Wheat noodles in a wheat-soy-sauce tare — NOT gluten-free.
